name: Machine Pain De Mie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in the bread pan and process on the standard bread setting.
2. Remove bread from the pan and cool on a rack. Wrap in a plastic bag or foil to store.
The addition of semolina flour seems to give the bread a close, even grain required for this type of bread. You can slice this bread as thin as you like; it's perfect for canapes, fancy sandwiches, or making melba toast or croutons once it's 2 or 3 days old. Enjoy!
